title: Heat Pump Controls
full_text:
5.2.8.5 Heat Pump Controls
Heat Pump Controls
1) Heat pumps equipped with supplementary heaters shall incorporate controls to
prevent supplementary heater operation when the heating load can be met by the heat
pump alone, except during defrost cycles. (See Note A-5.2.8.5.(1) and 5.2.11.1.(2)(e).)

sentences.text: Heat pumps equipped with supplementary heaters shall incorporate controls to prevent supplementary heater operation when the heating load can be met by the heat pump alone, except during defrost cycles. (See Note A-5.2.8.5.(1) and 5.2.11.1.(2)(e).)
